Description: Accounts, environments, Azure resources, Dataverse schema, sample data. Maps to Day 1-2 of docs/04_daily_tasks.md.
Intake Agent (FNOL_Start + 11 loss-type child topics) + Explanation Agent + multi-channel deployment. Maps to Day 3-4, 13-14, 17.
Extraction, Policy, Validation, Adjudication agents + Glass Box logging + Master Orchestration. Maps to Day 5-12.
Teams Adaptive Card + React frontend (Vite+Tailwind) + Theater Mode. Maps to Day 15-18 (UI mostly done already).
Sample data polish, Power BI dashboard, recording, rehearsal. Maps to Day 19-21.
Adapter procurement tracking for the 6 industry-gated data feeds (ISO/NICB/CARFAX/DMV/KBB/telematics). Not in dev's hand but a real workstream.
Two-surface SPA (customer + handler) on Microsoft Power Platform + Azure AI. Done — see Confluence PRD + GitHub frontend/.
Person 3 builds Policy, Claim, Document, Communication, Decision_Rationale tables per Schema Confluence page. Slim universal columns + LossTypeDetails JSON column on Claim.

Summary: R3 Sample data — 5 US Personal Auto policies
Description: Seed Sarah Chen (CA), Michael Johnson (TX), Jennifer Rodriguez (FL no-fault), David Park (NY no-fault), Amanda Williams (OH expired) into Policy table.

Summary: R4 Multi-channel Intake Agent — all 11 Auto loss types
Description: As a customer, I file an Auto claim of any of the 11 loss types via Mobile App, Web, Teams, SMS, or Email and Sara walks me through it in <2 min. Build FNOL_Start parent + 11 child topics in Copilot Studio per docs/intake_data_spec.md.
As Adjudicator, I confirm coverage applies to this claim's loss type; cite the policy clause. Power Automate flow calls Azure AI Search API directly (not multi-agent handoff per ADR 2026-05-04).

As Extraction Agent, I parse damage photos, driver's license, insurance card, repair estimate, police report, fire dept report, medical records (varies by loss type). Use Azure AI Document Intelligence prebuilt models + GPT-4o Vision for damage photos.
As a customer, I receive SMS/email with secure upload link if a required doc for my loss type is missing. Power Automate notification flow.

As Adjudicator, AI synthesizes Policy + Extraction + Validation results -> confidence + recommendation + plain-English explanation. Apply loss-type-specific rules and per-state no-fault routing. Azure OpenAI GPT-4.1.
As Validation Agent, I run NOAA + NHTSA (live public APIs) + ISO + NICB + DMV + Telematics + EstimateRule (sandbox adapters) in parallel. Each writes to Glass Box.
As Claim Handler, I review medium-confidence claims in Teams with one-click approve/adjust/deny/request more info. Adaptive Card JSON in docs/02_architecture.md.
As distressed customer, BI claimant, or fatal-injury claim, I'm transferred to live human CSR with full transcript. Teams chat handoff.

As regulator/auditor, every AI decision is logged in Decision_Rationale with plain-English explanation. Reusable Power Automate child flow Log_To_GlassBox called from every agent. Maps to Colorado SB21-169 + NAIC AI Bulletin requirements.
As Claim Handler, I see queue + claim detail + Glass Box panel + Theater Mode in a custom web UI. Done in frontend/ — Vite+React+Tailwind.
As customer, I file claims through a mobile-styled Web Chat that's visually distinct from a generic chat widget. Done in frontend/.
As anyone (customer or handler), I watch the 5 agents execute in real time during claim processing. Done as mock-driven; live polling against Decision_Rationale rows = backend integration.
As a Manager, I see operational KPIs (volume by loss type, tier mix, fraud-flag rate, avg time to decision). Power BI Service against Dataverse.

As Claim Handler, I sign in with AI Elites Microsoft 365 account. Mock today, production-ready Microsoft Entra ID config in frontend/staticwebapp.config.json under _PRODUCTION_SSO_SNIPPET_READY_TO_PASTE.
As customer, I can reopen a denied/closed claim if new evidence emerges or I dispute the decision. Adds Reopen value to gbx_status_claim_choice + gbx_parent_claim lookup column on Claim table.
Person 5 prepares synthetic but realistic damage photos, licenses, insurance cards, repair estimates for the 2 demo scenarios. Demo critical.
BUILD supports all 11 Personal Auto loss types end-to-end. DEMO showcases 2 polished scenarios: Sarah (Collision/Tier 1) + Jennifer (Comp-Weather/Tier 2). Day 19 dry runs.
Recorded screen capture of both scenarios in case live demo fails. Day 20.
10+ dry runs of the live pitch. Day 21.
Initiate procurement conversation with Verisk for ISO ClaimSearch carrier subscription. 60-90 day cycle. Owner: Sameet (or designated business lead).
Submit NICB membership application as carrier in good standing. ~30 day cycle.
B2B contract with Experian/CARFAX for vehicle history API. 45-90 day cycle.
Identify which states matter most (CA/TX/FL/NY/OH for our 5 sample policies); start contract conversations with each state's DMV API. Each state is a separate negotiation.
